ab: ihan 2022 qamisan, palaqanciap pa Sehu’ tu maqa takisilaza tu niuvunsiu’ ’a maqtu kopa’un nganBunun mapatas.
ch: 在2022年，政府召開了原住民身分證可單列族名的會議。
en: In 2022, the government announced that indigenous identification cards can include tribal names separately.

ab: macingav cak ki malbuntu tupa ki Sehu’ tu, “kopa’un nganBunun mapatas” han niuvunsiu’, talmindu tu Tiang tasikavan.
ch: 我訪問了長期向政府爭取身分證「單列族名」的部落青年Tiang tasikavan。
en: I interviewed Tiang tasikavan, a young tribal member who has long been advocating for the inclusion of tribal names on identification cards.

ab: patupakin cak cia tu namaca pal’u’un namunhan cak lumaq cia macingav.
ch: 我和他約定好這個假日到他家訪問他。
en: We had arranged to visit his home this holiday for the interview.

ab: matu ihan pacingav va, taqu’an cak cia tu mini’icaqa ngan cia, adasun cak cia pasaqal li tastulumaq cia cin acang cia.
ch: 在訪問的過程中，他向我介紹了他的名字的由來，也帶我認識了他的家人、他的部落。
en: During the interview, he introduced to me the origin of his name and also introduced me to his family and tribe.

ab: cingavan zaku naip tu makua cuna asa’un na ngan mahuvaiv, niqa macial la sinpatas qabas?
ch: 我問他為什麼堅持要改名，舊的登記方式不好嗎?
en: I asked him why he insisted on changing his name. Wasn’t the old registration method sufficient?

ab: tupa naip zaku tu, “opa maqa malastolu ka ni tu maqtu tupa ki anakanak tu ngan tulivaun ni bunun luklac tu Ti sinsi’ isqaqenanin aipi.
ch: 他對我說，因為用中文字並不能準確的傳達他的名字，其他人還會叫他「迪先生」，也因此鬧出不少笑話。
en: He told me that using Chinese characters could not accurately convey his name, and others would still call him \"Di Xian Sheng,\" which resulted in many jokes being made.

ab: tupa ka Tiang tasikavan tu, “maqa mamantu tu ngan na cia kuci’an malasBunun mapatas, maqa ngan na pasqal li sidoq cin tastulumaq, maqtu’ang nga Bunun mucoqes kilim mi ngan mapatas.”
ch: Tiang tasikavan說：「原住民語書寫的名字才是我們真正的名字。我的名字代表了我們的族群、我們的家族、我們的身分，希望能有更多族人找回自己的名字。」
en: Tiang tasikavan said, \"The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group, our family, our identity. I hope more fellow tribespeople can reclaim their own names.\"
